executive_summary: Build failures in scib_new repository are caused by duplicate Java source files in the root code/ directory. These files should only exist in the proper Maven directory structure under code/src/main/java/.

errors.title: Duplicate Source Files in Root Directory
errors.description: Java DTO files exist both in code/ root and in code/src/main/java/com/myproject/models/dtos/, causing compilation conflicts
errors.error_message: Duplicate class definitions found. Files: ApplyCouponRequest.java, CartItem.java, CartResponse.java, ErrorDetail.java, ErrorResponse.java, ValidateCouponRequest.java
errors.root_cause: Source files incorrectly placed in code/ root directory when they should only exist in code/src/main/java/com/myproject/models/dtos/
errors.impact: Maven compiler encounters duplicate class definitions, preventing successful compilation

recommended_fixes.title: Remove Duplicate Files from Root Directory
recommended_fixes.description: Delete duplicate DTO files from code/ root as they already exist in proper location
automated_steps: Files to remove from code/ root: ApplyCouponRequest.java, CartItem.java, CartResponse.java, ErrorDetail.java, ErrorResponse.java, ValidateCouponRequest.java
recommended_fixes.validation: Run 'mvn clean compile' to verify no duplicate class errors
